---
title: "Reproducibility & Open Science"
description: "Quarto, renv, targets, Docker, pre-registration, data sharing."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="reproducibility-open-science"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Reproducibility & Open Science</h1>
  <p class="lead">Quarto, renv, targets, Docker, pre-registration, data sharing.</p>
</div>
```
